kmp-platform-sdk.name: Kotlin Multiplatform SDK
kmp-platform-sdk.description: KMP library for pet projects, featuring authentication, token management, and core network components.
highlights: End-to-end development of a KMP library for cross-platform pet projects.

backend-platform-sdk.name: Backend Platform SDK (Ktor)
backend-platform-sdk.description: Backend service providing infrastructure and API for mobile pet projects.
highlights: Built a Ktor-based backend from scratch for integration with pet projects.

rate-and-review.name: Movie Rating
rate-and-review.description: Mobile application for searching and rating movies.
highlights: Developed a multi-module application from scratch using a modern tech stack.

smart_home.name: Smart Home
smart_home.description: Smart home management ecosystem for controlling cameras, lighting, sockets, and sensors.
highlights: Developed and maintained streaming video playback (Exoplayer, CloudSdk).
Implemented smart camera interactions: live streaming and remote settings management.
Developed a video event clip system (UI display, playback, deletion).
Migrated the 'Event Clips' feature to a new backend and updated playback architecture.

self-study.name: Self-Study Project
self-study.description: Dedicated project for practicing refactoring techniques and legacy code modernization.
highlights: Applied Clean Architecture and SOLID principles in real-world scenarios.
Refactored existing modules and updated the library stack.

investor_bank.name: Investor App
investor_bank.description: Banking service for event registration, news monitoring, and stock quote tracking.
highlights: Maintained and supported a legacy codebase.
Executed UI updates and migrated the codebase from Java to Kotlin.
Developed chat functionality: file/media attachments, replies, pinning, pagination, and deletion.

trading_info.name: Exchange Informer
trading_info.description: Information terminal for monitoring real-time stock exchange data.
highlights: Contributed to the application's architectural design.
Developed real-time data exchange features via WebSockets.
Created custom data visualizations using the MpCharts library.

courses_aggregator.name: Video Courses Aggregator
courses_aggregator.description: Educational platform for viewing and creating video-based learning content.
highlights: Developed features for video playback and content uploading.
Implemented a robust data caching system within the app.

metallurgy_staff.name: Manufacturing Staff App
metallurgy_staff.description: Enterprise mobile solution for employees of a major metallurgical corporation.
highlights: Integrated OAuth authentication with third-party providers.
Designed and developed a push notification system.
Implemented WebSocket-based real-time communication.

ecommerce_shop.name: E-commerce Shop
ecommerce_shop.description: Retail mobile client featuring product catalogs and order management.
highlights: Performed bug fixing and new feature development.

scooter_rental.name: Scooter Rental
scooter_rental.description: Fleet management and client service for a scooter-sharing platform.
highlights: Integrated an acquiring system for in-app payments.
Enhanced and maintained Google Maps API functionality.

oil_gas_construction.name: Industrial Tech Project
oil_gas_construction.description: Enterprise app for construction teams in the oil and gas industry.
highlights: Developed and maintained a Server-Driven UI (SDUI) application from scratch.
Co-designed a push notification system in collaboration with the backend team.

retail_staff.name: Retail Staff Project
retail_staff.description: Internal tool for retail store employees of a large-scale chain.
highlights: Optimized AWS integration modules and local database interactions.
Developed WebRTC-based calling functionality from the ground up.

distributor_info.name: Distributor App
distributor_info.description: Information service for a product distribution company's staff.
highlights: Fixed defects and implemented functional enhancements.
